title: matthiola fruticulosa
intro: Matthiola fruticulosa, also known as the fragrant stock or rock stock, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, making it a popular treatment for anxiety and insomnia. The health benefits of Matthiola fruticulosa include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote a good night's sleep and alleviate symptoms of restlessness and irritability.
